name: create_event
description: Creates a new calendar event with a title, time range, optional location, and attendee invitations.

title.description: The title or name of the event.

start_time.description: Event start time in ISO 8601 format, e.g. '2024-11-05T10:00:00'.

end_time.description: Event end time in ISO 8601 format.

location.description: Physical address or virtual meeting URL.

attendees.description: List of attendee email addresses to invite.

description.description: Optional notes, agenda, or details for the event.

reminder_minutes.description: Minutes before the event to send a reminder. Defaults to 10.
